blended.narrative: Mont-Sauvage (Owl's Head) is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 51°F.
Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
